findings.title: 缺少可执行的整阶段复核器和 Phase 提交绑定
findings.evidence: Phase 3.1/3.2/3.3 均为 candidate_pass，但不存在 Stage 3 whole-review verifier 来逐提交重算 evidence 与 artifact hash。
findings.remediation: 新增只读 stage3_whole_review 模块和定向测试，固定三个 Phase commit、evidence hash、12 个 task ID 及 artifact hash。

findings.title: 缺少 6 项 Acceptance、4 项 Stop Condition 与 Pass Gate 的最终证据索引
findings.evidence: Phase evidence 分散，尚无整阶段单一索引证明全部任务、Acceptance、Stop Condition 和 lineage gate。
findings.remediation: 新增 final_evidence_index.json，逐项绑定既有 phase evidence，并保留 pass_with_review_queue 解释。

findings.title: 缺少真实快照残余范围与阶段人工授权的哈希绑定
findings.evidence: 真实快照已有精确 partition，但 1250 条未确认转账候选和 249 条未确认退款尚未在整阶段验收对象中显式保留。
findings.remediation: 新增 source_disposition.json 和 human_acceptance.json；明确未确认链路只进入 review queue，并将授权绑定到最终证据索引 hash。

findings.title: Canonical governance 仍停在 Stage 3 candidate_complete
findings.evidence: 当前治理仍把 STAGE3-WHOLE-REVIEW 标记为 not_started。
findings.remediation: 在复审通过后将 Stage 3 标记 accepted_for_transition，仅授权 Stage 4 entry，Stage 4 保持 not_started。

verified_invariants: source/account role does not infer business role from provider name
unknown roles and unresolved event semantics fail closed without publication
duplicate import publishes zero second-pass ledger events
same economic event counts at most once per metric
real source is read from an immutable Git object and is not mutated
public evidence emits no raw rows, account identifiers or financial values

residual_risks_accepted: 1250 transfer candidates lack explicit link or effective account-role evidence and remain unconfirmed in review queue
249 refund candidates lack offset economic event identifiers and remain unconfirmed in review queue
source time precision is date-only and normalization does not claim exact transaction time
review queue persistence is outside Stage 3 and no production financial acceptance is claimed
